query:
ALTER TABLE consultations
  ADD COLUMN reportApproved BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
  ADD COLUMN reportApprovedAt DATETIME NULL,
  ADD COLUMN reportApprovedBy INT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN infographicApproved BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
  ADD COLUMN infographicApprovedAt DATETIME NULL,
  ADD COLUMN infographicApprovedBy INT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN slideDeckApproved BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
  ADD COLUMN slideDeckApprovedAt DATETIME NULL,
  ADD COLUMN slideDeckApprovedBy INT NULL;
